patch.value: Align package dependencies to pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6

package.json and lockfile use the current published pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6; pm-changelog is current where used; local build/typecheck/test/audit/pack/changelog checks pass with realistic package data; no secrets or private data are introduced.
Package manifest and lockfile now use pm CLI/SDK tooling 2026.6.6; changelog integration regenerated where applicable; repository-specific hygiene fixes applied without telemetry changes.
release:check, npm test, production audit, pm package doctor, and real-data package smoke checks pass.

Passed npm run release:check and npm test for all 15 packages; npm audit --omit=dev found 0 vulnerabilities; combined real-data smoke workspace installed all 15 packages and exercised import/export, graph, gantt, slack, standup, presets, starters, changelog, and pm-web doctor successfully.
Aligned package tooling with pm CLI/SDK 2026.6.6 and verified release readiness.
